titleStmt.title: SII 41.446: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 446. (A.R. No. 661 of 1905.) Tīrttamalai, Harur Taluk, Salem District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tīrthagirisvara temple on the hill at Tīrttamalai.

summary.p: Partly built in. Gift of cows and a lampstand for a lamp to the temple at Tīttamalai by Nāyaṉ Paḍalan alias Chittiramēḻi Amarapuyangara-tāyal-nāḍāḻvān of Miniyūr in Tāyal-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cirikulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattu nālāvatu puṟamalai nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tittamalai Āḻvuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkut tāyalnāṭṭu miṉiyūruṭaiya nāyaṉpaṭalanāṉa cittiramoḻi Amarapuyaṅkarat tāyalnāṭāḻvāneṉ Oru tirunu
pattiraṇṭu māṭum Oru Iṣapamum viṭṭu Orukuttu viḷakkumiṭṭu Ivai caṉtirātittavarai celvatākac cokkapperumāḷ tirumaṇṭapattil pāñcāṅkattilē kallum veṭṭiviṭṭeṉ cittirameḻi Amarapuyaṅkarat tāyalnāṭāḻvānen Ittanmam Iṟakkuvāṉen ka
kkumari Iṭaikkuṟāṟ pacukkonṟān piramakattip paṭuvāṉ Itupanmāyakeccurakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.446 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
